Stack Configuration Source Of Truth

Deployment defaults for the BlockDAG pool stack are centralized so one value does not drift across compose, installers, dashboard runtime helpers, watchdogs, and tests.

Rule

ops/config/stack-defaults.env owns non-secret, non-site-specific deployment defaults. Change values there first, then let scripts and validation project or verify those values elsewhere.

Do not put secrets, wallet keys, private keys, host IPs, local data paths, or operator-specific overrides in the defaults file.

Projection Points

LocationRoleExpected Behavior
.env.example, .env.cpu.example, ops/portable.env.exampleHuman-readable examplesMay contain concrete values, but scripts/validate-stack-defaults.py must prove they match canonical defaults.
docker-compose.ymlContainer env projectionCompose fallback expressions must match canonical defaults when a fallback is used.
ops/install-dashboard.shHost systemd/dashboard env installerLoads stack-defaults.env and writes generated env values through stack_default.
ops/release-install.shRelease appliance installerLoads the same defaults file in source or packaged layouts and writes defaults through helper functions.
ops/pool_ops.pyDashboard/watchdog runtime helperLoads stack defaults before module-level constants are frozen, then overlays runtime env files and operator overrides.
ops/maintain-rawdatadir-sidecar.shLow-priority sidecar maintenanceLoads stack defaults before applying the conservative rsync bandwidth cap and sidecar retention settings.

Dashboard Source Boundary

The active dashboard repository is BlockdagEngineering/dashboard2 on main, checked out locally beside the stack repo at ../dashboard2. Retired dashboard prototypes are not part of the active source workspace and must not be used as fallback dashboard sources.

Validation

PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/validate-stack-defaults.py
BDAG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/bdag-stack-validate-runtime PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 scripts/validate-pi5-restart-hardening.sh

The first check validates source-of-truth projection. The second includes it in the broader release hardening gate.
